name: phantomclaw
description: Codex workflows for PhantomClaw/OpenClaw remote browser automations, Railway operations, and safe platform playbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Run and document remote OpenClaw automations safely.
interface.longDescription: PhantomClaw captures the operating model for the public automation core, private control plane, CLI run-bundle sync, Railway-hosted OpenClaw gateway, and rule-aware browser automations such as Peerlist engagement.
defaultPrompt: Set up a safe remote Peerlist automation.
Check my Railway OpenClaw gateway health.
Document a new PhantomClaw run playbook.
